title: Road Trip Along Taiwan's East Coast

all.en: My family planned a four-day road trip along the east coast of Taiwan during spring break.
all.zh: 我的家人計畫在春假期間沿著臺灣東海岸進行四天的公路旅行。

all.en: We rented a comfortable car and started our journey early in the morning from Taipei.
all.zh: 我們租了一輛舒適的車子，一大早從臺北出發。

all.en: The Suhua Highway offered breathtaking views of the deep blue Pacific Ocean.
all.zh: 蘇花公路展現了深藍色太平洋的絕美景色。

all.en: We stopped at Qingshui Cliff to take photos of the dramatic coastline.
all.zh: 我們在清水斷崖停下來拍攝壯麗海岸線的照片。

all.en: In Hualien，we enjoyed fresh seafood and visited the famous Taroko Gorge.
all.zh: 在花蓮，我們享用了新鮮的海鮮並參觀了著名的太魯閣峽谷。

all.en: My younger sister loved feeding the friendly fish at the local farm.
all.zh: 我妹妹很喜歡在當地農場餵食那些友善的魚。

all.en: We drove through small villages where time seemed to move more slowly.
all.zh: 我們開車經過一些小村莊，那裡時間似乎流動得比較慢。

all.en: At night，we stayed at a quiet bed and breakfast run by a kind elderly couple.
all.zh: 晚上，我們住在一家由親切的老夫婦經營的安靜民宿。

all.en: The sunrise over the ocean in Taitung was the most beautiful sight I had ever seen.
all.zh: 臺東海上的日出是我見過最美的景象。

all.en: We tasted traditional aboriginal food and learned about the local indigenous culture.
all.zh: 我們品嚐了傳統的原住民食物，並了解了當地的原住民文化。

all.en: The road trip brought our family closer together and gave us unforgettable memories.
all.zh: 這趟公路旅行讓我們一家人更加親近，也留下了難忘的回憶。

all.en: A few months later, we still talk about that trip during family dinners on weekends.
all.zh: 幾個月後，我們在週末家庭晚餐時仍會聊起那次旅行。

all.en: My father printed a large photo of the Taitung sunrise and hung it in our living room.
all.zh: 我爸爸把那張臺東日出的照片放大列印，掛在我們的客廳。

all.en: My sister started learning a traditional dance from the indigenous community we visited.
all.zh: 我妹妹開始學習我們造訪的原住民部落的傳統舞蹈。

all.en: We are already planning another road trip, this time to explore the western coast.
all.zh: 我們已經在計畫下一次的公路旅行，這次要去探索西海岸。

all.en: My mother bought a guidebook full of small towns she wants to visit next time.
all.zh: 我媽媽買了一本指南，裡面滿是她下次想造訪的小鎮。

all.en: We saved all our receipts and ticket stubs in a special travel scrapbook.
all.zh: 我們把所有的收據和票根都保存在一本特別的旅遊剪貼簿裡。

all.en: My father said that the slow pace of the east coast helped him truly relax.
all.zh: 我爸爸說東海岸緩慢的步調讓他真正放鬆下來。

all.en: The elderly couple from the bed and breakfast sent us a homemade jam as a gift.
all.zh: 民宿的老夫婦寄了一罐手工果醬給我們當作禮物。

all.en: We promised to return next spring and visit the local farms during harvest season.
all.zh: 我們約定明年春天再回去，並在收成季節時造訪當地的農場。

all.en: That trip reminded us that the most precious thing is time spent together as a family.
all.zh: 那次旅行提醒我們，最珍貴的就是一家人共度的時光。

all.en: Six months after our trip, my parents announced a second road trip during summer break.
all.zh: 我們旅行結束六個月後，爸媽宣布暑假要再來一次公路旅行。

all.en: This time, we planned to drive along the western coast and stop in small fishing villages.
all.zh: 這一次，我們計畫沿著西海岸開車，並在小漁村停留。

all.en: My sister mapped out every restaurant she wanted to try along the entire route.
all.zh: 我妹妹把整條路線上她想嚐的每一家餐廳都標了出來。

all.en: We invited our grandparents to join us for the first three days of the journey.
all.zh: 我們邀請祖父母參加旅程的前三天。

all.en: My grandfather shared stories about his childhood visits to many of these towns.
all.zh: 我爺爺分享了他童年時造訪這些小鎮的故事。

all.en: We bought a small portable speaker to play our favorite music throughout the drive.
all.zh: 我們買了一台小型藍牙音響，在開車途中播放我們最愛的音樂。

all.en: Each evening, we wrote down our favorite moments in our shared family travel journal.
all.zh: 每天傍晚，我們都會把當天最喜愛的時刻寫進共用的家庭旅遊日誌。

all.en: The west coast sunsets surprised us with colors we had never seen on the east coast.
all.zh: 西海岸的夕陽以我們在東海岸從未見過的色彩讓我們驚艷。

all.en: My father said this journey made him feel young and adventurous all over again.
all.zh: 我爸爸說這趟旅程讓他重新感覺年輕又充滿冒險精神。

all.en: By the time we returned home, our scrapbook had doubled in size with new memories.
all.zh: 等到我們回到家時，剪貼簿已經因為新回憶而厚度加倍。

all.en: Inspired by these family trips, I started planning a solo cycling tour around Taiwan.
all.zh: 受到這些家庭旅行的啟發，我開始計畫一場環島單車獨行之旅。

all.en: My father lent me his old road bike, which he had restored carefully over the winter.
all.zh: 我爸爸把他冬天悉心整修過的舊公路車借給我。

all.en: My mother packed me homemade rice balls and a small first aid kit for the journey.
all.zh: 我媽媽為我這趟旅程準備了自製飯糰和一個小型急救包。

all.en: My sister created a custom playlist with songs from every region I would pass through.
all.zh: 我妹妹為我製作了一份特製歌單，收錄了我會經過的每個地區的歌曲。

all.en: On the first day, I cycled from Taipei to Yilan and rested at a quiet farm stay.
all.zh: 第一天，我從臺北騎到宜蘭，在一間安靜的農場民宿過夜。

all.en: The farm owner taught me how to harvest fresh vegetables for my breakfast salad.
all.zh: 農場主人教我如何採摘新鮮蔬菜作為早餐沙拉。

all.en: By day five, I had reached Taitung and revisited the bed and breakfast from years ago.
all.zh: 到了第五天，我抵達臺東，重訪了多年前住過的那家民宿。

all.en: The elderly couple welcomed me as if I were their own returning grandchild.
all.zh: 那對年長的夫婦像迎接自己回家的孫子般歡迎我。

all.en: When I finished the loop, my family met me at the train station with cheerful balloons.
all.zh: 當我完成環島時，家人帶著歡樂的氣球在火車站等我。

all.en: That solo trip proved that the seeds my family had planted years earlier had truly bloomed.
all.zh: 那次獨自旅程證明了家人多年前種下的種子已真正盛開。

all.en: Two years after my solo cycling tour, I organized a family-and-friends cycling weekend.
all.zh: 我獨自環島單車之旅兩年後，籌辦了一次家人與朋友的單車週末活動。

all.en: My father joined despite his age, riding his lovingly restored vintage road bike.
all.zh: 我爸爸不顧年紀加入了，騎著他精心整修過的復古公路車。

all.en: My sister mapped a gentle route through Yilan with several scenic photo stops.
all.zh: 我妹妹規劃了一條平緩的宜蘭路線，途中有好幾個風景如畫的拍照點。

all.en: We invited the elderly couple from the Taitung bed and breakfast to greet us along the way.
all.zh: 我們邀請臺東民宿的老夫婦在沿途與我們會合打招呼。

all.en: They prepared homemade rice balls and freshly squeezed juice for our entire group.
all.zh: 他們為我們整團人準備了手作飯糰與新鮮現榨果汁。

all.en: My mother wrote a poem about the journey in our shared family travel journal.
all.zh: 我媽媽在我們共用的家庭旅遊日誌中寫下一首關於這趟旅程的詩。

all.en: My grandfather shared old village stories that surprised even my well-traveled father.
all.zh: 我爺爺分享了古老村莊的故事，連走遍各地的爸爸都大感驚訝。

all.en: We ended the weekend with a celebratory dinner overlooking the deep blue Pacific Ocean.
all.zh: 我們以一頓俯瞰深藍太平洋的慶祝晚餐，為這個週末畫下句點。

all.en: That trip reminded us that our family roots had grown deeply across the entire island.
all.zh: 那趟旅行提醒我們，我們的家族根脈已深植整座島嶼。

all.en: My father said that watching three generations cycle together fulfilled his oldest dream.
all.zh: 我爸爸說，看著三代人一起騎車，實現了他最久遠的夢想。

all.en: Inspired by that cycling weekend, my sister proposed a yearly three-generation family expedition together.
all.zh: 受那次單車週末的啟發，妹妹提議每年舉辦一次三代同行的家庭遠征。

all.en: We chose a different region of Taiwan each year, mapping new villages and quiet mountain roads.
all.zh: 我們每年選擇臺灣不同的地區，規劃新的村莊與寧靜的山間道路。

all.en: My grandfather, despite his age, insisted on cycling at least the gentle morning sections each year.
all.zh: 我爺爺儘管年事已高，仍堅持每年至少騎完上午的平緩路段。

all.en: The Taitung couple from the bed and breakfast joined every annual journey as honorary family members.
all.zh: 臺東民宿那對夫婦以榮譽家人的身分參加了每一年的旅程。

all.en: My mother published her travel journal poems in a small collected volume during the third year.
all.zh: 我媽媽在第三年將她的旅遊日誌詩集成一本小型詩集出版。

all.en: Local libraries across the east coast invited her to read these poems to schoolchildren.
all.zh: 東海岸的當地圖書館邀請她朗讀這些詩給小學生聽。

all.en: My sister filmed a short documentary called Three Generations, One Road for a Taiwanese film festival.
all.zh: 我妹妹拍了一部名為《三代一路》的短紀錄片，參加臺灣的影展。

all.en: The film won a small audience award and brought new visitors to the gentle east coast villages.
all.zh: 這部影片榮獲一個小型觀眾獎，也為東海岸的寧靜村莊帶來新的訪客。

all.en: By the fifth year, even my youngest cousins were old enough to cycle the easier daytime routes.
all.zh: 到了第五年，連我最小的表弟妹也大到能騎完較輕鬆的白天路線。

all.en: Our family tradition had quietly become a small love letter written across the entire island of Taiwan.
all.zh: 我們家的傳統悄悄成為一封寫遍整座臺灣島的小小情書。
